testsuite.name: com.cscyxp.bookkeeping.AddViewModelTest

testcase.name: getCheckDate - should get checked date correctly()
date - initial value should be null and emit correctly()
handleKeyAction - should add category 0 when not select category()
[2] 超过两位小数, [DIGIT_1, DOT, DIGIT_2, DIGIT_5, DIGIT_6, DIGIT_7, DIGIT_8, DIGIT_9], 1.25
[3] 多个小数点, [DIGIT_1, DOT, DOT, DOT, DIGIT_5], 1.5
[4] 多个小数点, [DIGIT_1, DOT, DIGIT_5, DOT, DIGIT_4, DOT, DIGIT_5], 1.54
[5] 正常删除, [DIGIT_2, DIGIT_3, DELETE, DIGIT_4], 24
[6] 前置删除, [DELETE, DELETE, DIGIT_2, DIGIT_6, DIGIT_4], 264
handleKeyAction - should handle date key correctly()
handleKeyAction - should handle ok key correctly()
selectedCategoryState - initial value should be null()

testsuite.system-out: Expect: 100 | Actual: 100 Expect: 1780243199999 | Actual: 1780243199999 Expect: 3 | Actual: 3 Expect: 5 | Actual: 5 Expect: Category(id=1, name=, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[]) | Actual: Category(id=1, name=, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[]) Expect: 3 | Actual: 3 Expect: 5 | Actual: 5 Expect: Category(id=2, name=, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[]) | Actual: Category(id=2, name=, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[]) Expect: null | Actual: null Expect: 2026-05-31 | Actual: 2026-05-31 Expect: 1 | Actual: 1 Expect: 3 | Actual: 3 Expect: 5 | Actual: 5 Expect: Category(id=1, name=, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[]) | Actual: Category(id=1, name=, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[]) Expect: -1 | Actual: -1 Expect: -1 | Actual: -1 Expect: null | Actual: null handleKeyAction - should display input correctly: actions: [DOT, DIGIT_6, DIGIT_6] Expect: 0.66 | Actual: 0.66 handleKeyAction - should display input correctly: actions: [DIGIT_1, DOT, DIGIT_2, DIGIT_5, DIGIT_6, DIGIT_7, DIGIT_8, DIGIT_9] Expect: 1.25 | Actual: 1.25 handleKeyAction - should display input correctly: actions: [DIGIT_1, DOT, DOT, DOT, DIGIT_5] Expect: 1.5 | Actual: 1.5 handleKeyAction - should display input correctly: actions: [DIGIT_1, DOT, DIGIT_5, DOT, DIGIT_4, DOT, DIGIT_5] Expect: 1.54 | Actual: 1.54 handleKeyAction - should display input correctly: actions: [DIGIT_2, DIGIT_3, DELETE, DIGIT_4] Expect: 24 | Actual: 24 handleKeyAction - should display input correctly: actions: [DELETE, DELETE, DIGIT_2, DIGIT_6, DIGIT_4] Expect: 264 | Actual: 264 Expect: 1 | Actual: 1 Expect: 1 | Actual: 1 Expect: -1 | Actual: -1 Expect: -1 | Actual: -1 Expect: null | Actual: null
